SUB_LINE: Shot list · Music video · The loop block · 8 setups · ~1:40
SHOT_01_SETUP: Streetlight pool wide — Kilo walks into the single pool of sodium light, rest of the block black. The song starts on his footsteps before the beat exists.
SHOT_01_FX: Low-pass intro bed · footstep foley forward · lamp buzz
SHOT_02_SETUP: Pass two, identical frame — stranger now visible at frame edge, too still. Audience learns the frame; the difference is the story.
SHOT_02_FX: Split-diopter on stranger · doubled footsteps slightly out of sync
SHOT_03_SETUP: Pass three, tight on face under the flickering lamp — Kilo turns to camera for the first time all night.
SHOT_03_FX: Lamp flicker practical · buzz → 1-frame silence → drums
SHOT_04_SETUP: Security-cam angle owned at the laundromat — hard cut on the drop, timestamp burn-in running, Kilo enters frame mid-verse.
SHOT_04_FX: Timestamp burn-in · compressed source look · full mix opens
SHOT_05_SETUP: Dash-cam plate under the Eastbank underpass — car rolls past Kilo performing to no one; headlights sweep him like a followspot.
SHOT_05_FX: Rolling-shutter wobble kept · engine + verse mix
SHOT_06_SETUP: THE HANDOFF. A stranger's phone vertical — Kilo takes the phone mid-frame and finishes the bar into it. The film changes hands in one move.
SHOT_06_FX: Aspect punch to 9:16 · crowd yell · caption "SUPERCUT" hits + holds
SHOT_07_SETUP: Fluorescent interior — Kilo between the machines, security angle intercut with the phone POV. Two sources, one performance.
SHOT_07_FX: Fluorescent flicker · dryer rumble under the mix
SHOT_08_SETUP: Blue-hour rooftop closer — locked wide, skyline behind, Kilo small in frame. The only 'movie' shot in the leak block, earned by everything before it.
SHOT_08_FX: Clean grade returns · beat tail · title card
LEGEND: Block order on the night: L1-L3 (loop passes, protect the matches) → K1 (security angle) → K2 (dash-cam drive-bys) → K3 (the handoff — protect this hit) → K4 (laundromat intercut) → K5 (rooftop closer at blue hour). · Cast: Kilo Nova · 1 stranger extra. · Props: phone rig · lamp flicker dimmer · dash-cam mount. · Lighting: available sodium + one hidden bounce (loop) · source-true only (leak). · 1:10 is the locked anchor — aspect, sound, and grade all turn on the handoff. Everything before is composed; everything after is witnessed.
